body: Hi Elena — I’m reaching out about a short-form email and onboarding sprint for a consumer app. Your conversion work stood out, and I’d love to see if there’s a fit.
Appreciate it. What budget are you working with for the sprint?
We can go up to $5,000 depending on fit and timeline. If that range is workable, I can send over a few times to connect.
Thanks for clarifying. I wouldn’t be able to take this on for under $7,500.
Thanks for being direct. I don’t want to waste your time if the budget isn’t aligned, but I’d be glad to keep you in mind for future work that lands closer to your range.
